items.title: Navigation: add compact board quick-jump between /board and /settings
items.description: Keep board primary while making advanced controls reachable with one tap.

items.title: Board UX: add active saved-view helper text + clear affordance in toolbar
items.description: Clarify why a saved view is active and provide one-click reset to all views from the saved-views row.

items.title: Board UX: add compact board empty-state CTA linking to /settings advanced controls
items.description: When board has no matching cards after filters, show one-tap CTA to clear filters or open settings advanced controls.
